title: YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW TIGARD YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides alcohol and drug outpatient services for youth and their families, including integrated mental health services. Services are available in the community, including schools. Also provides a bilingual, culturally specific outpatient program for Latino youth and their families. 8770 SW Scoffins Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 12-18 (19 if still in high school) and their families. Culturally specific program serves the Hispanic/Latino community. Hours: Monday/Friday 7:30am-4pm, Tuesday-Thursday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 645-9010 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals on sliding scale. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday/Friday 7:30am-4pm, Tuesday-Thursday 7:30am-5:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus 76 or 78 to the corner of SW Scoffins and Main Streets Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STRENGTHENING FAMILIES PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW TIGARD
